items.title: Feature: Flag Support for Referrals
items.description:
With our current filtering, we parse and remove any sort of source/url origin tracking that is done with parameters followed by `?` which ends up removing referrals we try to append into our lists(e.g: `?gh_src`: Greenhouse Ref, `?source` : Workday Ref).

Open to have anyone contribute and add that implementation.
